gt_sql: SELECT T1.Diagnosis FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.IGM NOT BETWEEN 40 AND 400 GROUP BY T1.Diagnosis ORDER BY COUNT(T1.Diagnosis) DESC LIMIT 1
pred_sql: SELECT p.Diagnosis FROM Laboratory l JOIN Patient p ON l.ID = p.ID WHERE l.IGM IS NOT NULL AND (l.IGM <= 40 OR l.IGM >= 400) GROUP BY p.Diagnosis ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1
question: For the patients with an abnormal Ig M level, what is the most common disease they are diagnosed with?
